<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# NGINX — root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping

NGINX proxy at /ui/, app on /app context with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*. The proxy prepends /app when forwarding to the backend; dedicated /ui/HILLA/ and /ui/connect/ locations rewrite Hilla resources to /app/HILLA and /app/connect (Hilla resources live at the context root, not under the Vaadin servlet mapping). The catch-all carries root-level static resources.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

NGINX template (`nginx/http/root-to-custom-context-servlet-mapping/default.conf.template`):

```nginx
map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade {
    default upgrade;
    '' close;
}

server {

    listen       80;
    server_name  localhost;

    # Hilla resources live at the backend's context root (/app/HILLA/*,
    # /app/connect/*) regardless of vaadin.url-mapping. The browser calls them
    # under the Vaadin mapping, so the proxy strips /ui and prepends /app.
    # NGINX longest-prefix matching makes these blocks win over /. See
    # vaadin/hilla#289.
    location /ui/HILLA/ {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header        Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header        Connection $connection_upgrade;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080/app/HILLA/;
    }

    location /ui/connect/ {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080/app/connect/;
    }

    # Catch-all: prepend /app and forward to the backend's context. Covers
    # /ui/* (Vaadin servlet, including /ui/VAADIN/push), root-level static
    # resources (/VAADIN/*, /sw.js, /styles.css, /manifest.webmanifest,
    # /icons/*, /images/*) and root-level routes (/test-redirect, /info, ...).
    location / {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header        Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header        Connection $connection_upgrade;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080/app/;
        proxy_redirect $scheme://$host/app/ $scheme://$http_host/;
        proxy_cookie_path /app /;

        # Can be tuned if the Vaadin PUSH websocket gets closed unexpectedly
        # proxy_read_timeout 90
    }
}
```
